violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee changing gloves, but did not wash her hands before putting on clean gloves. Hands must be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. In use utensils found stored on the counter between uses. Utensils should remain in items serving or washed after each use.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser was found empty. Paper towels should be available at all times for drying hands.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
